payload.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Run unattended 30m dry-run heartbeat soak" in phase "30m Heartbeat Dry-Run Soak Test"?
groundedNodeLabels: Run a bounded unattended 30m dry-run heartbeat against real governed work and verify safety signals before unattended execution is allowed.
Review 30m dry-run soak evidence against promotion gate
Dry-run soak evidence is reviewed against the gate and any missing proof is explicit.
Promotion criteria are explicit, auditable, and stricter than the dry-run soak baseline.
Execute-mode promotion criteria are explicit, governed, and stricter than dry-run soak success alone.
recommendedNextActions: Implement heartbeat starts cleanly, remains bounded, and emits audit-backed tick evidence without writes
